phase: phase 5 public release live-test and stability simplification
active_phase: phase 5 public release live-test and stability simplification
current_task: Live-test the public v0.1.3 simplified stable receiver while launching Subnautica 2.
goal: Build a super simple Windows LAN audio bridge so laptop video audio can play through the main PC headphones while the main PC is gaming fullscreen.
constraints: Same internet means same Wi-Fi/router/local network for the MVP
No random virtual audio drivers in the MVP
Keep the direct sender-to-receiver path working before adding discovery or UI
Prefer simple launchers and truthful status over advanced routing features
Do not hardcode Grayson's main PC IP into the public sender launcher
Keep the receiver on/off simple; do not expose low-latency/balanced/gaming modes unless a real need returns
completed: Created project operating spine
Implemented Python UDP PCM packet framing
Implemented laptop sender command
Implemented main PC receiver command
Added PowerShell setup and launcher scripts
Added laptop Codex handoff prompt
Added project ignore rules
Added root Syncthing ignore rules for venvs and generated caches
Verified syntax and packet unit tests
Verified dependency install on this machine
Verified local audio device listing on this machine
Verified laptop dependency install
Verified laptop sender starts and captures Speakers (High Definition Audio Device)
Confirmed real audio reaches the main PC headphones
Added sender gain control and clipping diagnostics
Raised default sender packets from 5 ms to 10 ms
Raised receiver prebuffer and max buffer defaults
Added receiver missing-packet, late-packet, and underrun diagnostics
Changed receiver playback to skip late packets instead of playing stale audio
Confirmed tuned audio is clean with no noticeable lag
Added Manna Sound Sync tray wrapper
Added Start Menu shortcut installer and uninstaller
Installed tray dependencies locally
Installed Start Menu shortcut for Manna Sound Sync
Added sender config support through %APPDATA%/Manna Audio Link/sender-config.json

Added public README, MIT license, privacy note, icons, and release notes
Added separate Inno Setup scripts for receiver and sender installers

Published GitHub release v0.1.1 with fresh receiver and sender installers
Added Low Latency, Balanced, and Gaming / Stable receiver presets
Added receiver playback reset after repeated underruns or a long packet gap
Published GitHub release v0.1.2 with fresh receiver and sender installers
Confirmed Gaming / Stable behavior worked properly in live use
Removed preset UI and made stable receiver behavior the default
Published GitHub release v0.1.3 with fresh receiver and sender installers
next_focus: Install the v0.1.3 receiver from GitHub on the main PC
Launch Subnautica 2 while laptop audio is streaming
Confirm the simplified default receiver stays clean or recovers automatically
If the symptom returns, inspect receiver logs for underruns and resets
blockers: Human live verification from the public v0.1.3 receiver is needed on the actual laptop/main-PC pair
